activities_projects.title: Identifying the Traveller’s Traits
activities_projects.objective: Recognize simple personality traits of the traveller
steps: Read the chapter 'Travel' carefully
Identify basic traits like curious, observant, or adventurous
Write the traits in your notebook
Give one example from the story for each trait
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of traits with examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Listing Journey Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the sequence of events in the traveller’s journey
steps: List the main events of the journey in order
Write one sentence about each event
Share your list with a partner
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct order and clarity of events (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Understanding the Main Message
activities_projects.objective: Identify the simple theme or lesson of the story
steps: Discuss in class what the story teaches about travel or exploration
Write a short paragraph summarising the main message
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students grasp the basic theme of the story
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of the lesson (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Descriptive Writing Practice
activities_projects.objective: Write simple descriptions based on the journey
steps: Choose a scene from the story
Write 3–4 sentences describing what the traveller sees or hears
Share your sentences with classmates
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and completeness of description (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Practice
activities_projects.objective: Learn and use simple new words from the story
steps: Find 5 new words in the chapter
Write the meaning of each word
Use each word in a simple sentence
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and sentence usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Short Dialogue Writing
steps: Pick a short conversation in the story
Rewrite it as a dialogue in your notebook
Include who is speaking
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and correctness of dialogue (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Travel Diary Entry
steps: Imagine you are the traveller for a day
Write 4–5 sentences about your day
Include what you saw and how you felt
activities_projects.evaluation: Relevance and clarity of diary entry (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Sentence Type Practice
activities_projects.objective: Identify and write simple sentence types
steps: Find 3 declarative, 2 interrogative, and 1 exclamatory sentence from the story
Write them in your notebook

activities_projects.title: Group Discussion on Travel
steps: Discuss in pairs why travel can be exciting
Share one interesting point from your discussion with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students practice speaking and listening skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation and relevance of ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Ending Activity
steps: Think about how the story could end differently
Write 3–4 sentences describing your ending
Share your ending with the class
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and creativity of ending (10 marks)
